No sales rush, no excuses, no delays and quality work.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCrNPPdw5e-OHZPXCPdLr7y&fid=0x0:0x3bf2ec5f4b2e918b"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Stephanie Baker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWw4d6WQ-8mde_ww2PH6C-hx0uQxzaV6nz6-efVimYM_UZpwL_C=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Being a first-time homeowner has been daunting to say the least, and it’s been a challenge finding trustworthy and reliable tradespeople to assist with renovating the exterior which was left in an absolute state of disrepair when I bought it 2 years ago.

Enter Permanent Siding & Windows.  I reached out to them for a quote to have the siding on my home replaced and was pleasantly surprised by Emma’s quick response to my request; they even completed the job several weeks prior to when it was originally scheduled which was totally unexpected but definitely appreciated.

When Darryl came out to get an idea of what I was looking for and provide the quote, he was friendly, knowledgeable, as well as extremely gracious and patient with all my questions. The quote was super reasonable in comparison to others I received, and Darryl’s communication throughout the job was stellar. He was in touch with me and onsite regularly to make sure things were coming together as needed.

Jeff helped with the tear down of the old siding, while Scott and Mike did both the teardown and install (siding and window capping).  I cannot express my gratitude enough for the entire team, but especially Scott and Mike.  I am beyond impressed with the quality of their workmanship and the finished product is even better than I could have imagined. I have so much respect for their skill and the care they put into all aspects of their work, and deeply appreciate that they cleaned up the site at the end of every single day. They were lovely and did such phenomenal work. I am absolutely thrilled at how it looks and that it has really secured the exterior of my home which was the primary reason behind replacing the existing siding.

As a whole, I am truly impressed with the Permanent Siding & Windows team. And without question, they went above and beyond in all aspects of this job which was no easy feat given the original state of the house. Navigating home ownership has been quite stressful, but the folks from Permanent Siding & Windows have made it a heck of a lot easier and reminded me that there are some wonderful trades people who take pride in doing beautiful work. I will be recommending Permanent Siding & Windows to anyone that I can. They are absolutely fabulous!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnttXV5wE&fid=0x0:0x3bf2ec5f4b2e918b"],"When":"2024-9-25"},{"Name":"Mc Cr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrF5PLIesvyEkAjhqFoO2cRcT2Q1jaacw8of3OoS_plHpFDPlS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had 4 bay windows replaced. Darryl responded quickly to our initial inquiry by setting up an on-site visit and following up with a quote.

The installation crew are very professional and showed great respect for our home. They kept the work areas very clean and neat. The crew all have a good eye for details and it’s reflective in the high quality finish of the bay windows installation.

[{"Name":"Holly Kelly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKEnEzWQXt8Ot3WTwnfqjN3vl4gcGYctcYbmNX5_JrawK6rpw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very impressed with our experience with Niagara Roof Masters, from our consultation to then working with the team lead Ryan and his team, everyone was so professional. Our roof was completed in one day as they advised. The team completing the job were very friendly and mindful of my children coming in and out the house and my dogs in the backyard. Clean up was thorough. We received quote from a few companies in the area and were very pleased with the warranty and financing options that no other company could offer. Ryan specifically went above and beyond to ensure we were happy. Communication was very clear on all aspects. I can not  recommend Niagara Roof Masters enough, very pleased with the service provided.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELbVqJ6o9t6GvAE&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2025-5-15"},{"Name":"Anna Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQSCHjBWwX4btIo3Y5QIpmcu7WnCKEytDPcos7Du-vi-3YuDU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Well l had a surprising leak downstairs just before l was planning to go away, David came to the rescue, he explained the issue and took care of the problem, now l have peace of mind and l am happy to go on my vacation. Thank you so much David for rushing over and help a widow like myself. God bless Niagara Roofmasters for everything. They are amazing l have full confidence in them doing the work efficiently and good bye leak. Hallelujah!!!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDMUtO7HNwOcVJHBjay8MJt&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Carolyn Odell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWx14iDepzfhHYtBlZodTyHQY59gN-VXGM1yy-doi8ElnkTdg8W=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After several quotes on repairs and reshingling my roof, I  stopped  looking when Roofmasters came. Not only professional yet friendly, Derek went up in both attic spaces and showed me pictures  of a concerning issue, while other companies  just walked around the roof. He was thorough, informative and patiently explained things without being pushy. Ryan came in throughout  to check on progress and completion, putting me at ease. Pricing was explained and more than fair as many sheets of plywood needed replacing. Communication is key with this company.  When they say they will be there, they are. Weather permitting,  they show up, from daily work, bin removal, flashing completion, to final check up when complete.
I can't  say enough about Kevin and his crew. Kevin was amazing, going above and beyond. His knowledge, skill and great work ethic saw the big job done beautifully and I  am thrilled. The crew efficiently cleaned up as they worked, as well as the end of each day
I can now relax and not worry the next time a wind storm  blows through !
Thank you to the Team at Roofmaster!             I highly recommend  you to everyone!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD21Gz1AiZ5ZhFZUSA3ex3X&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2025-9-16"},{"Name":"spruce","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmFl_YZw9kw4_vjjP5jFXJoXY11R1miSEJd2dzOFeSjocuDw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Reply: The debris has already been cleaned up, but your offer is appreciated. Just wanted to make people aware to avoid this in the future.

This is about the company's negligence towards others' safety, respect for others' property, and work clean up. A neighbour hired this company to do their roof. As these pictures show, on my property, we found;
- random loose nails,
- roofing tile pieces,
- a roofing tile with 2 nails sticking up,
- a row of 10 brad nails that we almost wouldn't have found, or could've stepped on if they didn't shine in the light
- a piece of clear plastic wrap
- it appears that a worker stuffed Timberline packaging under my fence where there's a small opening

A large part of this disregard for others' safety and property was when a worker from this company was up on the neighbour's roof, blowing the garbage/debris away with a leaf blower, which fell onto my property.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAM1-eNftP_nWDbgLaFWUcW&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Neal Cockshutt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKU_7fNQrxU7r41yv8KHwSusWfJeI9fuVL6ziqu7ur8TZy-Qw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible to deal with. Months late starting job. Left garbage in my yard for weeks and weeks. Several months later they have not finished and are demanding full payment. This was booked in June, supposed to be completed by September and December 19 they still have not completed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBG5_lIG02A7pcYgN3jlER&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2025-12-19"},{"Name":"Norman Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIsv5LTJb5T7Sv-Rhwyl8k70r_Ft1uF0wVKAhKfcJI9T37DmA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the first visit with Dan to the final visit withRyan there was no doubt about the service and craftmanship of all involved. The finished roof was all I could ask for and am grateful for their service and the quality of their work. Thanks again, Norman Smith","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jack Chirico","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJWSUPlAgUgRUQ_xEumIutRQ95eY2sXyrnq0lIWQLIgxcQQ84M=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Niagara Roof Masters delivered excellent service, and Craig was a standout throughout the process. He was professional, courteous, and made sure every detail was handled with care. Thanks to Craig, the whole experience was smooth and stress free. I would highly recommend both the company and Craig for top tier roofing work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"melanie ker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-TfeAJK07d7-RTZ2fMcsAn7i1R7JvWddabvqhv4oRuq-8RSEt=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We hired Niagara Roof Masters to redo our roof after another company hired by our insurance made a mess of our roof. Kevin and his team put our roof before their own lunch needs, so they could make sure our roof was complete before the rains came. Kevin even made an awesome video showing exactly what went into doing our roof right!!!
Thank you to our friend and excellent sales manager Derek Poirier for getting us set up right!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDTnpyMJg&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2024-5-24"}]

title: Sheppard Roofing- Niagara
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Greg James","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV51ypdQFx60W-rgybANoneGQtHSi2VXe1spv7YRUHzSQc7QqmS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Marco and his team did a great job on my property in St. Catharines. Off the top, he was very quick to give us an accurate and detailed quote and answered all my questions.  Marco was able to get us booked in within a week. He brought a big team and got the job done quickly to avoid nasty weather. Roof looks good and the cost was very reasonable. Recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENiI1uDuoIfIMw&fid=0x0:0xe0967d68df49b44f"],"When":"2025-5-18"},{"Name":"Elyse Dudzinski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVA-jXBsqsIH2AsUrdpQPJLWaUrHdsy6FtQ5CtJsE4F0VjGkHYf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Marco and his team were exemplary. I appreciated the education at the beginning of my research process and working directly with the owner of the company who was on site to manage the job from start to finish. When I wasnt on site (I wasnt required), I received photo and text updates.

My high- profile roof townhouse required some technical aspects and they went above and beyond to see my site was secure, safe and ultra clean throughout and most definitely at the end.

I would recommend their work to my friends and fellow neighbours.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDPuYqCiwE&fid=0x0:0xe0967d68df49b44f"],"When":"2024-12-3"},{"Name":"Dan B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqtKe6lRLiYt-Dwonkep3uMm-vrxLGhS7kodC4KD3QjthVQtk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t speak highly enough of Marco and his crew. He had a quote to me with 24 hours of contacting him which including a satellite analysis of my roof and 3 different pricing levels depending on what I wanted done. Very responsive whenever I texted with questions, they had the roof installed and everything cleaned up in a matter of 6 hours. Would highly recommend Marco to anyone in the Niagara Region looking to get any work done in their roof.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICx7LLE7gE&fid=0x0:0xe0967d68df49b44f"],"When":"2023-5-12"},{"Name":"Justine De Bouvier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ3HVRLZQZUWOLmLFkwbLBGz4wfMJeo58eTyWiv7NjECkVYQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sheppard roofing did a fantastic job on my roof.  The new roof looks gorgeous!!  Marco and his team are thoroughly professional in removing and installing a new roof.  They replaced all vents and the metal around the chimney.  Their installation included weather proofing materials.  I couldn’t be happier with my new roof!!  I can’t rave enough about Marco and Sheppard roofing in St. Catharines!!  I give them my highest recommendation!!!  You won’t be disappointed!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDWh5WWYw&fid=0x0:0xe0967d68df49b44f"],"When":"2022-4-5"},{"Name":"Christine Lynn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXAKrikvMkHe8eV398Wuxj-gkrp29F3wR31hB-fAqn8A3sgra_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t say enough positive attributes about this company. Marco contacted me right away, and sent me a quote that first night. He answered all my questions, and genuinely made me feel like he cared about my needs, and that I wasn’t just another roof under his belt. The crew was on time, efficient, and offered a solid roof within my budget. From start to finish the job was done in a day and a half! I would recommend Marco and his team to anyone looking to get their roof done!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICpq7vYBg&fid=0x0:0xe0967d68df49b44f"],"When":"2023-8-10"},{"Name":"Jordan Axani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcLabXHVZqYGrnpxxkG3iATqIXUtkElo2wmAFSX9P5Z1Dzlyo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I posted on Homestars after another contractor backed out at the last minute. Naturally, I was frustrated and concerned that the next contractor I would hire might do the same, especially with winter coming so soon.

Luckily, Marco from Sheppard Roofing replied quickly, thoughtfully, and was able to give me a quick, transparent quote.

He patiently answered my questions and addressed my concerns, and arranged time to meet to allow my wife and I to see samples of the product. We were also provided local examples of recent installations to be able to see the completed product before committing to a purchase. Once we gave Bruce the go-ahead he did a good job of keeping in touch and was only slightly beyond the initial estimated timeframe, due to inclement weather. We were notified ahead of time as to when materials were being delivered to our home and when the installation crew would be on-site. On the day of installation, Bruce's son, Scott, and another employee (whose name I unfortunately didn't get) made short work of our 7-square roof, completing it in a little over half a day. Scott was also very courteous, polite and likewise addressed any additional questions I raised during installation. Their accepting payment by eTransfer just added to the convenience of getting this much-needed job done.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-pZy21gE\u0026fid=0x0:0xedde4bb53fa09850"],"When":"2022-11-8"},{"Name":"Justine P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYaqW2nZVyHIO-cXkncbpTRsl-nPu58-UVlVDj8sCbKomBSnvP=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had our roof redone in metal shingles from Hindrea. When I attended on my first visit, I was greeted and assisted thoroughly by Marina(sp?) at the counter. Marina was very pleasant and willing to answer and price out all the options I expressed interest in. Once answering all my questions, Marina then without prompting kindly encouraged me to contact sales representative, Jordan Spear, to perhaps obtain better pricing on the options I inquired about.

I contacted Jordan contemporaneously, who then took the time through multiple email correspondences to answer additional questions I had, and provide me with very competitive pricing for the siding and materials I was interested in.

Ultimately I decided on a siding option and placed my order through Roof Mart very recently. Overall, I had a very positive experience with the staff there and would encourage everyone looking for home building products to patronize Roof Mart due to their friendly and helpful staff, and very good pricing.

**** UPDATE - 29 January 2025 ***

This morning delivery driver Steven attended our home to drop off the siding and accessories we ordered from Roof Mart. Steven was courteous and very efficient with craning the materials into position for me to later load them into storage. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mashnoor Rashid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZgioH2dpbGe-9pGl1cC2jHvuYxVLkbJWFkpL8PQzhJklDsfWoxg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a flood in our basement due to a sewage backup, and Jake and the PuroClean team were incredible in helping us through such a stressful situation. They thoroughly explained the extent of the damage, proactively handled mitigation, provided detailed reports, and took the time to answer all our questions about repairs and insurance processes. Jake and his team were also very accommodating with our schedules, which made a big difference. It was a real pleasure working with them—they truly made a difficult time much easier to manage. I would highly recommend PuroClean to anyone in need of their services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kyle Doubleday","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJaqbjgHQJnb8wNchYQEW4SdOK1QN95NRSNOtJWx-2gE0UVrg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a sewer back up in our finished basement. PuroClean came in and ripped out what was contaminated and set up the blowers and dehumidifiers. It was clearly explained what was being done and what would be done over the next few days, and then throughout the rebuild phase. Excellent communication during the whole process. Great work by everyone, from those who packed up everything to the Drywallers, painters and the carpet installers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jenn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJ4Dpd0e4ptIu6NqfRf2ffgNzOtL9eDPtYUkonC3sXHemCgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had water damage, and the crew did an excellent job of cleaning up the areas of concern very quickly. There was great customer service from Carly who initially took my call, Jake, who was quick to respond and explained what they were going to do, and the fantastic job the work crew did. I highly recommend Puroclean.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Fuller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVFbtJITpvW0nt-dbQ1QUSEC_ut-B_h3ozgqwV6CwboeAMctWx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have nothing but good things to say about Puroclean. This team managed my flood restoration from start to completion flawlessly. Jake arrived with the dehumidifier fans literally minutes after the sewer blockage was cleared. We had an approved repair estimate in a reasonable amount of time with de-construction and packout almost immediate.
A full crew was sent to clean, pack and label our belongings and carted away for storage.
And then Maamon arrived ! This is the guy you want on site for your re-build. He is amazing!  Drywall, ceilings, painting, trim work and flooring. He does it all !
Thank you all for helping us thru a difficult time.
John and Maryann","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Cari Epp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPgLPtKNtFMMafiqReav08PK7ibnHi4rNcQc6Kq8iGkVzDtXc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"At first during the water extraction they were excellent however when it came time to do the rebuild it took a good 2 months to get started and the sub-trades they had were much to be desired. They would disconnect or move the security cameras, each time their painter came in there were more touch ups needed after he left, they did not cover our new floors before painting and then used a paint scraper to remove spills. Everytime we would bring a concern the response would be "I will look into it" or it not us its the other contractors or they would agree to your face but not follow through. I would definitely not recommend using this company","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gino Pansino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsHh7n9olrOCALN6ND40GPcl5bB58oRANcgTdjUBJ-Iv1PJg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Puroclean for any restoration that you might need. The whole staff from Carly, Marcello ,Lisa and the whole staff were awesome to work with!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robin Sutton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5iM20bpvGueXN-rtEA-zXdReTT0QqOM5Cxj9YqjfcEg6Sk64=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If you get to choose...choose a different company.  I had a flood, and my insurance company sent Marcello from Puroclean.  He brought dehumidifiers, told me to "do nothing", and left.  I did a whole bunch of things to save what I could, which saved me a LOT of loss.  Communication was terrible- I was away when they went into the house to demo and pack it out, and I was told I would get a call so I could direct packing my work items (I got no call).  I had to unpack and repack my whole POD as they packed my work things that I needed.  The packing was terrible- only about ten percent of the boxes were labelled with any indicator of what was inside.  They took things that were packed up already in totes and repacked them into boxes- totally unclear why.  Lamps were packed with wet rugs, linens were packed while damp, pieces of furniture were discarded that shouldn't have been (for example, one piece of a three piece desk).  The demo work was shoddy- drywall that should have been removed at an even 2 feet was all over the board in measurements, making it extremely challenging for my drywaller to replace.  Every contractor I've had in since the demo has pointed out and experienced areas where the work was sub-par.  The repair estimate itself was initially less than HALF of what it ended up being- I had to advocate strongly on my own behalf to ensure I was getting what was equivalent to what was demo-ed.  This took many emails and reminders over many weeks. The furnace tech who Puroclean sent told me he recommended a new furnace, and it took me two months and five requests for Puroclean to produce this report and get it included in the estimate.   Overall, a very poor experience.  Again, if you get a choice, choose differently and don't choose Puroclean.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Rivet","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcxFqUswsYdZsEpo34yZw_xXKnaclQPR4w0YSCclIJ9JSsxCyitw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The customer service was outstanding. I am so pleased with their service. They arrived within hours of my phone call. Provided me with exactly what I needed. I would highly recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We are very happy with how it turned out","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDXrSbVMQhzt1B3ZUxghaD&fid=0x0:0x7848ce49fbed57eb"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"Nathan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOPSl_ezdImZ0MZjQlw9JUFzhpYD69vizFjD7VJ62vs1KC14p5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They say the 3 pillars of business are, Quality, Affordability and Good  Service...customers can only pick two. Exterior Xperts break the rule and provide quality workmanship, excellent customer service all for an affordable price.
We built a new house and these guys came highly recommended... We soon found out why. From day one, communication was clear. Dimitri was so patient and responsive in answering all our questions. There was A LOT of back and forth as we kept changing the design. Dimitri never once made us feel rushed into a decision. Our happiness was his #1 priority! We decided on Hardie board in a board and baton and horizontal board. We also wanted custom capping around each window.
Once the contract was signed and deposit was made, Denys and his crew started. Over the course of the job, there was maybe a handful of days they were not on the job due to weather or completion of another job. These guys work long days and committed to the job.
Workmanship, Denys pays attention to detail. There is no rushing the job! They would rather the job be done well than fast.
Affordability. Exterior Xperts were the most cost-effective choice for the work we wanted. No surprises. The price we were quoted was the price we got.
On a side note, the whole team are just great to work with. One day, their scaffolding accidently disrupted a neat of baby bunnies hidden under a pile of leaves. Unbeknownst to them, they hurt the bunnies and they took them to a local vet! They also were careful to relocate birds that made nests in the soffit areas. I can't say enough about Dimitri, Denys, Raymond and all the other workers that worked on our house. They take pride in their work and it shows! Highly recommended... You are crazy to not use Exterior Xperts for your exterior project.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmXNalQxuWQJ4wioPrEt2P&fid=0x0:0x7848ce49fbed57eb"],"When":"2025-6-12"},{"Name":"Khloudy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3aIREDudi0gpGqPhTrA8hpPrOsQZ9zgB_zDNjSGnXhohdRAga=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Hardie siding installed a few weeks ago and we’re really happy with it. The house looks fresh and modern, and the siding feels super sturdy. You can tell it’s made to last, and that gives us a lot of peace of mind. It’s also nice not having to worry about warping or fading like we did with our old siding. The upgrade was totally worth it. Great product and a big improvement to our home!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCu4EmBHUNImL8TNo3-TdxB&fid=0x0:0x7848ce49fbed57eb"],"When":"2025-7-5"}]

We had a leak behind our toilet and called a company most are familiar with. (RR ) we kept pointing out it was the pipes behind the toilet. 5 visits later they finally removed the toilet. Thankfully our insurance put us in touch with First General. BRIAN ROKOS was absolutely amazing! From the emergency drying process to the beautiful restoration. He is a very caring individual. My wife has several serious health issues and I can't count the times he made additional visits to Niagara Falls to meet with my wife. From the beginning he started every phonecall,email, and visits asking how my wife was doing. I highly recommend calling First General and asking for Brian Rokos\n\nAll of  the contractors he hired were just as wonderful, especially Antonio of Matamoros Construction, my home looks beautiful now, My wife is love with the floors! BRIAN went above and beyond. Be sure to ask for Antonio as well both he and Brian are exceptional!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Higgins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-Vke51icPY2IFf_EiIZ37AughqmwHP1prlFqKh3Hs4NVNOw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Had a leak around a window, my insurance company referred the claim to First General, who came, assessed the damage and recommended Gemini Windows \u0026 Doors.  Gemini’s assessment was the leak was due to improper siding install and lack of proper sealant.  The repair cost me $6000 out of my pocket, plus $1000 deductible.  First general, replaced the window sill, had the carpet cleaned to removed the water stain and painted the ceiling in the room below the window, that was paid for between my deductible and my claim.  The file was closed and a few weeks later it leaked in the same spot.  The owner David came out to look at it and knew right away that the window was improperly installed from day one.  He suggested some caulking be applied in the channel that should have had flashing installed and said “we need to make this right”. Mike from Gemini windows came out and did the temporary fix and applied a bead of caulking in the area of concern.  The leak stopped, for now.    I have emailed and called asking that David return my calls, it has been three months.  So the Personal got paid, calls in to them, they don’t care.  Gemini got paid to incorrectly determine the cause and eventually applied a bandaid fix.  First General got paid, and are not getting back to me.  As for me? I got another reminder how corporations don’t care about the customer anymore.  Take your money and move on.  If your insurance company refers you to First General ask to be referred to someone else.  If that someone else refers you to Gemini, ask for someone else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tony Basilone","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJG9D9yYkwfyGdyMcQoPonE6kCReFV-wc7QvsGn56ZaoAuPug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First General helped make a very difficult situation manageable. Dan and his team was professional, on time, and he took the time to explain the process before starting. The installation was clean, precise, and greatly improved the look and drainage of our home. Which was  great relief with all this snow! Everything was left tidy, and the workmanship was top quality. I would confidently recommend Ace 1 Quality Roofing to anyone in St. Catharines or the Niagara Region.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael James","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMBnVT_rJPAUPrru5-Pv2Smnm0N3eOgurtxWkqohOJ0RvNeA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I spent a lot of time collecting RFQs for the roofing and siding work on my addition, and Ace 1 Quality Roofing stood out immediately. From the start, Dan was completely transparent about materials, methods, pricing, and quality. Nothing was vague or glossed over. Because this wasn’t a straightforward roof, he took the time to walk through the scope in detail so there would be no surprises, add-ons, or upcharges later. His pricing was fair and clear.
The install itself was scheduled during poor weather, with framing crews still on site. The risk of exposing the interior of the house was high. Dan’s crew arrived fully prepared and coordinated seamlessly with the framers so exposure was kept to an absolute minimum. The roof went on smoothly, looked great, and every detail was addressed properly.
Fast forward two months. This winter has been brutal, and ice damming is affecting nearly every home in my neighbourhood. While I was still in the process of installing insulation and vapour barrier, a small leak appeared overnight. I called Dan, and he showed up first thing the next morning. He immediately identified and addressed the issue—apologizing, even though the cause was not his materials, workmanship, or installation. It was the result of extreme ice damming in a congested roof area and my own delay in completing insulation.
Despite that, he cleared the problem and walked me through several preventative solutions to ensure it wouldn’t happen again. That level of response was above and beyond what was required, and it says a lot about how Ace 1 operates.
This industry has no shortage of potential problems. I’m confident Ace 1 Quality Roofing isn’t one of them. Dan and his crew stand behind their work, offer customized solutions, and remain transparent from start to finish. Their reputation clearly matters to them—and it shows.
Thank you, Dan, and the entire Ace 1 team","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Martine Rioux","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFvKpPX8K47Zrp-Ke5_1EqcG_kIcbR9nghZ1W4M38VXR1sDxzv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After the snowstorm we had last week we needed roof repairs done quickly and Ace 1 Quality Roofing delivered. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"J Cleary","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocImgkmXDAnQLfkLM_M7j7InZprvf5a6IQcslLgRxuT_H0g0sQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First off, I want to let Rob and Mike know that their advertising works!

I paid closer attention to Gemini's radio ads this past summer when I was looking for the best siding business in Niagara. While Gemini has competition, they proved to be the best in the area, bar none.

It was great to meet with Rob in his office and get a computerized mockup of various colours and styles of siding to help us narrow down the right choice.

For the record, this meeting happened before we even decided on Gemini. Compare that to the competitors we reached out to who either never called us back, or the competitor that quoted us unrealistic SIX FIGURES for the job without the itemized details. (was he joking or was it a typo? If you're that careless and disinterested in your business, we're not the customers for you!).

After we signed the contract, the work was completed quicker and cleaner than we expected.

It does take more than catchy ads to be the best, and Gemini scored high marks for quality, selection, affordability, professionalism, and attention to detail.

There were a few hiccups with our older home, but nothing out of the ordinary with our siding job. I can say that with confidence because we bought our house during COVID and the interior renovation process we experienced was less than ideal. Yes, a global pandemic created nightmares across the board, but when you deal with a true pro in the trades like Gemini, you realize how much other contractors make excuses for what is actually a lack of professionalism.

Rob, the radio ad worked for me and your team (specifically Mike and Jay) went above and beyond to make our home shine in our neighbourhood.

I would highly recommend Gemini for your siding and window projects. We are glad we did.

Cheers and thanks to the Gemini team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dustin Hopfner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUr8vJ0MO1UqporbiZ-CScsSZDrhmfYCusfPpfcESg6cYuN9r2zBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was looking to replace all the windows and doors in my house and thought I was in for a nightmare. I called Gemini Windows, Doors & Siding and was immediately answered by Shelby. She made the process of setting up the quote feel easy breezy, and already I had a good feeling. Andrew showed up to do my quote and was very human with me the whole way through. He was very honest about what I needed (and what I didn't need) and at no point did it feel like he was pushing me to do more than I wanted. After I got a very fair quote sent my way, Rob, the owner, reached out to me with a couple suggestions and changes he could make to save me even more money! He was willing to meet with me at his office after hours at a time that worked with my busy schedule. From the minute we shook hands, I knew I was not going to regret this, and I haven't for a second! The install team of Mike and his guys were fast, efficient, and super tidy. They had no issues removing their shoes in the carpeted areas, which I can't say enough how much I appreciate. Their install looks great, and all 13 of my windows and the front and back doors have been given a look that will stand the test of time!
Thank you Shelby! Thank you Andrew! Thank you Mike! And Thank you Rob!! The whole team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brandon Dochstader","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlE77AGNcGCJ5fgGUt85S3sZv2YHsY27s2WRkdWNorNesgfc04=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One stop shop for all your exterior needs. Would highly recommend Gemini. Couldn’t have asked for a better finished product. 100 stars from us. Customer service is impeccable. My whole basement flooded and it was a disaster! Service Masters came out very fast. Got everything set up and going to prevent mold and help get the water out. They worked well with my insurance which made it so much easier for me.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOvZuNiSp62J2gE\u0026fid=0x0:0x4055111df0f44040"],"When":"2025-5-23"},{"Name":"Will Chang (Will)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpItLH9OW91rbwJdZkJifDk-dM5-SvmMOE5VBMjznf-mIP9ApxZA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So Will Tischer was and his entire team was incredible to work with. They came in a completed the emergency repair on my basement which was flooded this past July 2024. Will was patient with my questions and often checked in on me and the status of my claim, he helped me understand the nuances of my predicament as dealing with your insurance company can often be confusing and flat out scary.  There are often many moving parts which you do not control, for instance their is your Agent for example who will recommend using 3rd party Adjusters(experts who examine your flood damage and send it to your insurance company) this can often be confusing because your insurance company in my case CAA has the final say on where to use that inspection or send someone else that they prefer. So imagine multiple people coming in and out of your house in the first 48 hours, trying to take charge when really there is no guarantee you will officially work with them. To be honest there was a lot of confusion around who would be doing the final work on my house all said and done, but Will and his teams job was simple, store personal items carefully, catalogue and dispose of all damaged and unsolvable items(submitted to CAA by Will and his team for review), disinfect and clean, and then comeback a few days later to remove parts of your base boards dry wall, flooring and doors that were contaminated by water.  I personally recommend Will and his team to take care of your Emergency needs. And while I ultimately settled with my insurance company I would have happily worked with Will at Service Master had I decided to go through with the repairs thereafter. Word to the wise, just know that this process is long, painful and you are going to need a lot of patience, one of the great parts about working with Will was that he did have patience, often when I wrongfully accused his team sometimes of taking so long when it was really my insurance company that was responsible. Will always either accepted my phone call or if I missed him he would call back usually within 30 minutes. Dude is super nice on the phone and frankly I needed someone I could vent to who was super understanding and listened to my situation. All in all, great guy, company and team. Highly recommended! -Will Chang","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICH9v73Eg\u0026fid=0x0:0x4055111df0f44040"],"When":"2024-9-4"},{"Name":"Brad Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI40p300Iwn01VIWmeqgYk1G2Yi7tXajlGRRv3EZjbGtz-Tug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had ServiceMaster Restore handle some restoration work for us, and the experience was excellent from start to finish. Their team was professional, punctual, and communicative throughout the entire process. The quality of their work was top-notch, and they went above and beyond to ensure everything was completed properly. Highly recommend ServiceMaster Restore for anyone needing reliable and efficient restoration services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"joellyn mangano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgQoyVz7gTUYp3XRQ-tdlySMYifjqzKju5vn0CCT5yrooYbY6gnw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This past summer I had a faulty washing machine flood my first floor and basement at the lake. My insurance sent out Ian and Colin. They were effoecnet and clear in what the process would look like. Colin’s teams from mitagation damage and mold removal- to completing the repairs was amazing. The crews sent were beyond knowledgeable in their trade and outstanding as to how they rebuilt, clean and moved through the hiuse.  Their leadership and communication as to what was needed and the respect for the stressful situation it was could not have been anymore seemless. I cant say enough about service master and their crews. Thank you.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"The Luxury Stager","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKlWWYUrtHiCLGVhtycP8wC8k-76aOFVgsSYKAxdMdsNEi4YI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Will was incredibly responsive, from a call to them at 10pm, our clean up was complete by 1am. Every single phone call to various other suppliers resulted in "sorry, we can't guarantee a delivery date. Once you place an order with payment, we should have a better idea... within a couple months". This project was time sensitive, and these responses were not acceptable.

We then called Megan at Patene, and we are so glad we did. Not only was it the first phone call where the person on the other line genuinely sounded happy, but Megan sprang into action and ordered our material with an expected delivery date of a few weeks later... 4 months before anyone else could. Incredible customer service AND effective and productive? Unfortunately this is far too rare, but Megan went so far above and beyond for us that we have a regained faith in humanity.

Cons: Scuffed siding here and there (minor),  satellite dish 'removal' (minor because addressed by owner)

In Feb 2018 I asked JPG Construction to estimate the cost of re-roofing my house.  Jean Phillip (JP) came over the same day,  on time, and made a great impression for JPG Construction. Jean Phillip is not impatient or aggressive.  He listens to questions and answers them thoughtfully. He made helpful suggestions. Of course, I agreed to his estimate. :)

April 10 2018  Jean Phillip was on site to greet me and to see the job started. The shingle delivery was right on time.  Jean Phillips' brother was lead man of the crew.  The crew came to work exactly on time and started the job with energy and enthusiasm.  My roof was covered with workers by 8:10. The crew was mindful of safety for themselves, my family and mindful of our pets.  The job was finished in 8 hours as JP said it would be. The yard was clean.  There are some minor scuffs in the siding, I think you cannot them see from the street.  A satellite dish was thrown out in error,  I only asked to have it removed.  Jean Phillip is taking care of that for me.

My experience was very positive and I will have more work for this company in the future.  Do yourself a favor and hire this company before they are too busy!

Thank you JPG for a great job!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEt7aCXA&fid=0x0:0x9b8af7c926549798"],"When":"2018-4-12"},{"Name":"Karl Regier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlUfc9zVrJ6v3UNzRLrh1MFCbxTB3Hkk5RlgmO80dPhawh6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"JPG did and amazing job and were in and out in a day when my tenant was away, the tenants came back and said "The new roof looks great and the crew did a hell of a clean-up job.
